final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a product launch campaign featuring 长安起源Q06.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, high-impact visual aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a dominant hero background image with title and subtitle overlaid in a brand-aligned hierarchy
Subject: must include 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop — exact environment and depth treatment are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a translucent, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source and volumetric treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with automotive brand gravitas — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of depth and visual clarity — exact surface and glass/light treatment are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title), "9月上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve PPT cover aspect ratio (16:9 widescreen), title and subtitle must be legible against the background
Avoid:
